Mirroring is reflecting others. It is a major part of the [[Omega Covenant]] and [[the Pride]].

The [[Master slave dialectic]] causes substantial impairment to mirroring.<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n1flcGrb81M</ref>

The Hall of Mirrors is the end of the [[Three Fruits|fruit]] of Omega, [[Immortality]] is the step towards it

It involves the rejection of [[envy]] as a core element

== References ==
[[Category:Omega Covenant]]
[[sn:Mirroring]][[Category:Mirroring]]
[[sn:Mirroring]][[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
